headings.usage: Use for all H1-H3. H1 should be dramatic (text-5xl+).

body.usage: Use for body text, navigation, and UI elements.

monospace.usage: Use for technical terms, code snippets, or data values.

head_tags: <script>tailwind.config = { theme: { extend: { colors: { primary: '#004438', accent: '#009A77', dark: '#022C22', light: '#F8FAFC', gold: '#D4AF37' }, fontFamily: { serif: ['Playfair Display', 'serif'], sans: ['Manrope', 'sans-serif'], mono: ['JetBrains Mono', 'monospace'] } } } }</script>

navbar.classes: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-gray-100 transition-all duration-300
navbar.cta_classes: bg-primary text-white px-5 py-2.5 rounded-full hover:bg-dark transition-all shadow-lg shadow-primary/20 hover:shadow-primary/40

hero.bg_classes: bg-gradient-to-br from-[#022C22] via-[#004438] to-[#003030] text-white overflow-hidden relative
hero.heading_classes: text-5xl md:text-7xl font-serif font-medium leading-[1.1] mb-6 tracking-tight
hero.subheading_classes: text-lg md:text-xl text-gray-300 font-light max-w-xl leading-relaxed mb-8
hero.button_primary: bg-accent text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-medium hover:bg-white hover:text-primary transition-all shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,154,119,0.3)]
hero.button_secondary: border border-white/30 text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full hover:bg-white/10 transition-all backdrop-blur-sm

card_bento.container: group bg-white p-8 rounded-3xl border border-gray-100 hover:border-accent/50 transition-all duration-500 hover:shadow-2xl hover:shadow-gray-100/50 relative overflow-hidden
card_bento.icon_wrapper: w-14 h-14 rounded-2xl bg-light flex items-center justify-center text-accent text-2xl mb-6 group-hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-500 group-hover:bg-accent/10
card_bento.title: text-2xl font-serif text-primary mb-3
card_bento.link: inline-flex items-center text-accent font-medium hover:gap-2 transition-all

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. REPLACE all contents of 'css/style.css' with a minimal reset only (or empty it), because we are moving to Tailwind.
2. UPDATE 'index.html' first. Add the Tailwind/Font scripts to the <head>.
3. REWRITE the <body> of 'index.html' using the class names provided in 'components'.
4. DO NOT use generic layouts. Use the Bento Grid strategy for the 'Solutions' section.
5. REPLACE emoji icons with Phosphor Icons (e.g., ).
6. ADD 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive elements.
7. ENSURE all text contrast meets WCAG AA standards (Tailwind colors provided are compliant).
8. For 'Triangle of Legitimacy', use a CSS-only triangle or an SVG with 3 nodes.
